title: The Barb Leads, the Zon Clears
body: Let the Barbarian run ahead to draw aggro and tank. The Javazon follows 1-2 screens behind, throwing Lightning Fury into the packs that swarm the Barb. This prevents the Zon from getting surrounded.

title: Battle Orders is Non-Negotiable
body: Always rebuff BO before dangerous areas. The Javazon benefits massively — she's naturally squishy, and BO can double her life pool. Barb should cast BC first, then BO for maximum duration.

title: Splitting Immunities
body: Lightning Immune? The Barb handles it with physical damage. Physical Immune? Extremely rare, but the Zon's lightning cuts through. The only nightmare: dual-immune Physical + Lightning. Skip those.

title: Boss Kill Protocol
body: For act bosses: Barb tanks and uses Frenzy with Crushing Blow gear. Zon uses Charged Strike at melee range — it's the highest single-target DPS skill in the game. Bosses melt in seconds.

title: Optimal Farming Zones
body: Cows: Zon paradise — LF one-shots entire herds. Chaos Sanctuary: Barb tanks Diablo, Zon clears seals. Baal waves: perfect duo content, rotate tanking and clearing by wave type.

title: Exp Sharing Strategy
body: Stay within 2 screens of each other for shared XP. In 2-player games, monsters have 50% more HP but you gain full XP. The faster clear speed more than makes up for the HP increase.
